expectedAssertions: report-quality preserves the grouped performance actionability question in JSON and Markdown
report-quality does not emit recursive fixtureCandidates for an already-materialized synthetic fixture
the fixture keeps scopeBoundary.shipguardOnly and targetAppsReadOnly explicit
performance reports expose groupedActionPlan with firstExperiment, validationRoute, and stopCondition

sourceQuestion: Which grouped performance observation should become a public fixture or eval case before changing scanner heuristics again?
